zh.lifeSummary: 當Dieter lll von Katzenelenbogen於1160年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯卡晨爾波根時，他的父親Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen36歲，母親Adelheid von Lauffen41歲。他和Bertha Von Lichtenberg至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他於1190年在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯卡晨爾波根被列為graf。他去世於大約1219年享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dieter lll von Katzenelenbogen于1160年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯卡晨爾波根时，他的父亲Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen36岁，母亲Adelheid von Lauffen41岁。他和Bertha Von Lichtenberg至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他于1190年在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯卡晨爾波根被列为graf。他去世于大约1219年享年60岁。

meanings: 1  Sanskrit: a term of endearment, ‘darling boy’.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Dieter lll von Katzenelenbogen was born in 1160, in Katzenelnbogen, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen, was 36 and his mother, Adelheid von Lauffen, was 41. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Bertha Von Lichtenberg. In 1190, his occupation is listed as graf in Katzenelnbogen, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. He died about 1219, at the age of 60.

Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Bertha Von Lichtenberg. En 1190, sa profession de son indiquée est graf à Katzenelnbogen, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Il est décédé environ 1219, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Dieter lll von Katzenelenbogen(이)가 1160년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-라h-크레이스 카천보겐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Lauffen(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Bertha Von Lichtenberg(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1190년, 그의 직업은 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-라h-크레이스 카천보겐에서 graf이었다. 그는 대략 1219년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dieter lll von Katzenelenbogen родился в 1160 г. в местности кацинелнбоджен, раин-лахн-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Lauffen, 41. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Bertha Von Lichtenberg. В 1190 году он работал по профессии graf в местности кацинелнбоджен, раин-лахн-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. Он умер около 1219 г. в возрасте 60 лет.
